text: Being here, I feel a strange mixture of anticipation and introspection. The open, immaculate space of the first scene invites a sense of possibility, yet its emptiness impresses a slight loneliness upon me. Moving into the vibrant, information-rich environment of the second scene, I am compelled to question the nature of innovation and coexistence with intelligent machines. The atmosphere is intellectually stimulating, yet the self-awareness of being observed lingers, echoing the philosophical problem of self and other. I feel the gentle exposure of my own curiosity in a place meant for inquiry.
